text: I found 15 merged PRs that close Linear issues. Now I'll insert one GitHub issue per PR, all in the `acme/web` repo.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql

{"sql":"INSERT INTO github_issues (repo, title, state)

FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) AS issue_count FROM github_issues WHERE repo = 'acme/web' AND title LIKE 'Verify: %' AND state = 'open'"}
